message: We'd love to see a bulk export feature for our audit logs. We're a compliance-heavy org and this would save us hours every month.
core_issue: The user wants a bulk export feature for audit logs to save time.
summary: The request proposes a bulk export feature for audit logs to enhance efficiency for a compliance-heavy organization, prioritized as high with a confidence score of 95%. This functionality is recommended for integration into the product roadmap to streamline monthly workflows. No escalation or immediate urgency signals were identified.
